digitalBridge.title: How to be a digital bridge
digitalBridge.subtitle: If you have a stable connection, you can help family members with no internet in Venezuela
digitalBridge.step1: When a family member calls from Venezuela, get these details before the call drops: full name, ID number, last known location, physical description, what they were wearing.
digitalBridge.step2: Before creating a report, search first at venezuelatebusca.com and desaparecidosterremotovenezuela.com by name and ID. Avoid duplicates — they saturate the system.
digitalBridge.step3: If they don't appear, create a report at venezuelatebusca.com. Upload a photo if you have one. Registration is immediate.
digitalBridge.step4: Share the report link with all family WhatsApp groups.
digitalBridge.step5: When the person is found, mark them as located. This frees up capacity for those still missing.

report.title: Report outdated information
report.placeholder: Describe what information is outdated or incorrect
report.success: Thank you. We'll review your report within a few hours.

disclaimer: VeConecta is an independent citizen initiative. We verify information before publishing, but resources change fast. Always confirm before acting.
